message.content:
#set page(margin: 1in)
#set heading(numbering: "1.")
#set math.equation(numbering: "(1)")

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Inline and Display Mathematics]
  #parbreak()
  Source-backed grouped formula sample
])

= Expressions

#par[Expression 1.] The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ #text("$\\bar{\\Xi}^{\\lambda_1}_{\\lambda_2} \\otimes l^{\\dot{I}}_{\\dot{J}} \\otimes 1 ( \\bar{\\phi}^{\\rho_1} \\otimes s^{\\dot{K}} \\otimes \\phi^{\\rho_2} ) = \\delta^{\\rho_1}_{\\lambda_2} \\sum_{\\dot{K}_1\\dot{K}_2 = \\dot{K}} \\delta^{\\dot{K}_1}_{\\dot{J}} \\bar{\\phi}^{\\lambda_1} \\otimes s^{\\dot{I} \\dot{K}_2} \\otimes \\phi^{\\rho_2}.$") $

#par[Expression 2.] The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ #text("$\\Omega=2i(1-\\frac{1}{2}\\frac{1+z\\bar{z}}{\\zeta}\\theta\\bar{\\theta})\\frac{{\\rm d}z\\wedge {\\rm d}\\bar{z}}{\\zeta^2}+i(\\frac{{\\rm d}\\theta \\wedge {\\rm d}\\bar{\\theta}}{\\zeta}-\\frac{\\bar{z}\\theta}{\\zeta^2}{\\rm d}z \\wedge {\\rm d}\\bar{\\theta}-\\frac{z\\bar{\\theta}}{\\zeta^2}{\\rm d}\\bar{z} \\wedge {\\rm d}\\theta).$") $

#par[Expression 3.] The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ #text("$s(\\Gamma)\\equiv\\int(\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta\\varrho}\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta A}+B \\frac {\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta\\bar{c} }+\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta\\sigma}\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta c}+\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta\\bar{Y}}\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta\\psi}+\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta\\bar{\\psi}}\\frac{\\delta\\Gamma}{\\delta Y}=0$") $

#par[Expression 4.] The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ #text("$\\big\\{f, g\\big\\}= \\Big(\\frac{\\partial f}{\\partial x_{i}}\\frac{\\partial g}{\\partial p_{i}} - \\frac{\\partial g}{\\partial x_{i}}\\frac{\\partial f}{\\partial p_{i}}\\Big) + \\theta\\Big( \\frac{\\partial f}{\\partial x_{1}}\\frac{\\partial g}{\\partial x_{2}} - \\frac{\\partial g}{\\partial x_{1}}\\frac{\\partial f}{\\partial x_{2}}\\Big).$") $

#par[Expression 5.] The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ #text("$\\frac{d}{d\\lambda}S_{\\omega,\\mathbf{c}}(\\Phi^{\\lambda})\\big|_{\\lambda=1}=\\sum_{j=1}^3\\left.\\left\\langle (D_jS_{\\omega,\\mathbf{c}})(\\Phi^{\\lambda}), \\frac{d}{d\\lambda}\\Phi^{\\lambda}\\right\\rangle\\right|_{\\lambda =1}=\\sum_{j=1}^3\\left\\langle D_jS_{\\omega,\\mathbf{c}}(\\Phi), \\frac{d}{2}\\Phi+\\nabla \\cdot \\Phi\\right\\rangle.$") $
